title: Verify existing implementation of phone number formatter
description: The phone formatting utility in src/utils/format-phone.ts was created with 18 passing tests covering US/international formatting, edge cases, and combined options. The task also involved testing the @kody --complexity low flag behavior in the pipeline, which showed plan/review stages still executing despite the override, suggesting a potential issue with the Kody engine complexity flag handling.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility module pattern with co-located .test.ts file
Locale-aware formatting utility following similar pattern
Formatting utility with options object pattern
